hero.title: ILLUSION FIGHT
hero.subtitle: In a world where the arena is virtual, the scars are real. They always were.

slide1.subtitulo: Kim is 17, sells candy on buses and just entered an arena where the pain is 100% real. Three billion players. Zero preparation.

slide2.titulo: A picture is worth a thousand words.
slide2.subtitulo: Monthly release here on the portal — one week ahead of any other platform. Early access for those who arrived first.

slide3.titulo: The expanded LDI universe is here.
slide3.subtitulo: Nine games ready for your enjoyment. And soon, much more. Put your token in and play.

slide4.titulo: The band Jack mentions is real.
slide4.subtitulo: The songs from the Illusion Fight universe are on streaming platforms. Come on in for the vibe.

slide5.titulo: I started this at 17. It took me 23 years to make it happen.
slide5.subtitulo: If you want to be part of this, you can. And you'll be very well rewarded for it.

city.detective_dialog: DETECTIVE: "You think this is just a game?"
city.idoso_dialog: ELDER: "I've lived here since Marélia was just a village. A lot has changed..."
city.crianca_dialog: CHILD: "They say Yohualticit messes with strange things!"
city.vendedor_dialog: VENDOR: "Unbeatable deals! Only today! Buy 2, get 1 free!"
city.operario_dialog: WORKER: "The factory never stops. Three shifts a day."
city.marinheiro_dialog: SAILOR: "I've sailed the seven seas. Marélia is the safest port."
city.feirante_dialog: MARKETEER: "Straight from the farm! Fresh fruit every day!"
city.cozinheira_dialog: COOK: "Try my pastel! Family secret recipe!"
city.seguranca_dialog: SECURITY: "No ID, no entry. Those are the orders."
city.morador_dialog: RESIDENT: "It's quiet around here, but at night... better not walk alone."

quiz.subtitulo: Three billion fighters. One ranking. How much do you really know about LDI?
quiz.nexus_tag: NEXUS PHANTASM — HERALD OF THE ARENAS
quiz.timer_aviso: 30 seconds per question · speed counts toward final rank
quiz.ajuda_consultar: Who do you want to ask?
quiz.bloqueio_desc: Subscribe to unlock RECRUTA and ELITE modes, rank history and unlimited university help.
quiz.rank_desc_elite: World top. Kronos has his eyes on you.
quiz.rank_desc_ranqueado: Competitive. But still a way to top 1000.
quiz.rank_desc_aspirante: You know enough to survive. For now.
quiz.rank_desc_novato: Promising. Re-read the chapters and come back.
quiz.rank_desc_recruta: Not even Thunderbolt would have lost that badly.

blocks: I started working at 13, selling candy on buses. I didn't know it then, but I was living the story I'd one day write.

At 17, in a history class, I realized we never told the story of Brazil's indigenous peoples, that whole world before "discovery". I saw an entire universe waiting there. That's when Lutas de Ilusão began. I wrote it in Word, printed it at school, and handed out the pages. Every week people asked for the next chapter. My writing was rough, but the story worked.

That was the era of the Rock Crew, a name we didn't even choose (our principal gave it to us after we broke a vase in the schoolyard, the thing was always clogged anyway) and it stuck forever. Years later, from 21 to 25, I had a band called The Problem. LDI was always there in the background, waiting.
At 25 I got married. I have a wonderful daughter and wife, and it wasn't easy, but if it were easy, everyone would do it, haha.

At 30 I'd been a public servant for 10 years, earning less than $200 a month, and I wasn't happy. I decided to flip everything upside down: studied hard for a scholarship, and by my first semester of college I already had a job. I started specializing in console porting, Nintendo, Xbox, and PlayStation.

The moment that defined everything happened at my first company, less than a year after the Switch launched. Nobody there knew how to work with that console. I was an intern, handed a dev kit, some documentation, and a game: "you have one month to ship it, this is your test." That's how it began.

I got into games and worked on international projects, including titles like Five Nights at Freddy's and a release that reached the God of War universe. But I want to be honest: as much as I love this industry, it isn't stable, and everyone in it knows that. If you didn't, now you do. I moved into traditional software development (starting over from junior again). Today I'm 40, and I'm finally publishing this story.
Lutas de Ilusão is an independent project. Every chapter, every webtoon page, every song has real cost and real work behind it. Supporting it is the only way to keep it alive and growing.

taglines.ldi: NARRATIVE RPG, create your avatar, make your choices, face your battles, discover the truth!
taglines.jack: idle noir. dreams have no logic. this one has beer.
taglines.pesadelo: 20 cases. a conspiracy. a friend in danger.
taglines.arena: Classic TURN-BASED combat building a sheet and rolling dice. Single Player and Online Multiplayer.
taglines.tama: There's no way you can resist this cute thing, but if you're going to have one, you have to take care of it responsibly.
taglines.trumps: Collectible cards on your account. Build your deck. Single Player and Online Multiplayer.
taglines.tatics: Ever thought of playing Pokémon but with tactical battles? That's right, and I'm testing it. I'll release it for everyone soon.
taglines.minigames: standalone puzzles. no login. just skill.
taglines.duelo: Ever thought of playing Yu-Gi-Oh but with battles on a board? That's right, and I'm testing it. I'll release it for everyone soon.

sliding.desc: rearrange the tiles in the right order.
sliding.detalhe: slide the blocks. one empty slot. complete the picture.

labirinto.detalhe: invisible walls. only your touch. only your instinct.

forca.detalhe: letter by letter. each error brings you closer to the end.

anagrama.detalhe: letters out of order. your brain is the decoder.

simon.desc: memorize the sequence. repeat without error.
simon.detalhe: growing color sequence. one mistake and restart. how far can you go?

advantages.label: Acrobat
advantages.desc: +1 on dodge and movement tests. Costs 1 MP per use.

advantages.label: Adapter
advantages.desc: Ignores 1 penalty from unfavorable environments.

advantages.label: Lucky
advantages.desc: Gains +1 on initiative rolls.

advantages.label: Ally
advantages.desc: Summons ally with Strength 1 to aid in combat.

advantages.label: Arcane
advantages.desc: +1d on elemental power damage. Costs 2 extra MP.

advantages.label: Archer
advantages.desc: Can perform ranged attacks with 1d damage.

advantages.label: Block
advantages.desc: Declares block against physical attack; reduces damage by 1d.

advantages.label: Bomber
advantages.desc: +1d on attacks with gunpowder weapons.

advantages.label: Boxing
advantages.desc: +1d on unarmed attacks while in guard.

advantages.label: Camouflage
advantages.desc: +1 on stealth when in favorable terrain.

advantages.label: Charismatic
advantages.desc: +1 on social interactions before combat.

advantages.label: Counterattack
advantages.desc: After being hit, can counterattack with 1d.

advantages.label: Determined
advantages.desc: When below half HP, +1 on attack and defense.

advantages.label: Dual Wield
advantages.desc: +1 extra attack with secondary hand, -1 on roll.

advantages.label: Dodge
advantages.desc: +1 on FD against direct attacks.

advantages.label: Evocation
advantages.desc: Allows summoning elemental creature of PdF 1.

advantages.label: Fury
advantages.desc: Spends 3 MP for +2 Strength for 3 rounds.

advantages.label: Immunity
advantages.desc: Immune to poisons and diseases below your R.

advantages.label: Intuition
advantages.desc: +1 on perception tests for traps and ambushes.

advantages.label: Leadership
advantages.desc: +1 for allies within 3m while visible.

advantages.label: Medicine
advantages.desc: Heals 1 HP per round on adjacent ally.

advantages.label: Deadly Aim
advantages.desc: Spends 1 round aiming for +1d on next attack.

advantages.label: Parkour
advantages.desc: Ignores terrain penalty for 3 rounds.

advantages.label: Reflexes
advantages.desc: +1 on initiative and reaction tests.

advantages.label: Regeneration
advantages.desc: Heals 1 HP per round while in combat.

advantages.label: Senses
advantages.desc: +1 on sensory perception tests.

advantages.label: Luck
advantages.desc: Gains 3 extra MP at the start of combat.

advantages.label: Technique
advantages.desc: Draws, stows and attacks in same turn without penalty.

advantages.label: Sprinter
advantages.desc: +2 on running and movement tests.

advantages.label: Veteran
advantages.desc: +1 on critical rolls (15+).

advantages.label: Vigor
advantages.desc: Suffers no penalty from light wounds.

disadvantages.label: Unlucky
disadvantages.desc: Rolls 1 less die on luck tests.

disadvantages.label: Code
disadvantages.desc: Cannot attack unarmed or back-turned enemies.

disadvantages.label: Dependence
disadvantages.desc: Loses 1 HP per round if not consuming item.

disadvantages.label: Disease
disadvantages.desc: Max HP permanently reduced by 2.

disadvantages.label: Phobia
disadvantages.desc: If Skill test fails, loses the action.

disadvantages.label: Slim
disadvantages.desc: Strength reduced by 1 for physical damage.

disadvantages.label: Honor
disadvantages.desc: Does not attack first; always lets opponent act.

disadvantages.label: Age
disadvantages.desc: Skill reduced by 1; experience gives +1 XP per victory.

disadvantages.label: Insomniac
disadvantages.desc: Recovers half MP between combats.

disadvantages.label: Slow
disadvantages.desc: Acts last on initiative ties.

disadvantages.label: Lame
disadvantages.desc: Movement reduced by half.

disadvantages.label: Fearful
disadvantages.desc: If Escape test fails, loses the action.

disadvantages.label: Proud
disadvantages.desc: Never refuses a duel or provocation.

disadvantages.label: Poor
disadvantages.desc: Cannot buy items between combats.

disadvantages.label: Thirsty
disadvantages.desc: Spends 1 extra MP per power used.

disadvantages.label: Sensitive
disadvantages.desc: +1d damage taken from opposite element.

disadvantages.label: Deafness
disadvantages.desc: -1 on auditory perception tests.

disadvantages.label: Stubborn
disadvantages.desc: Cannot change tactic once declared.

disadvantages.label: Addiction
disadvantages.desc: Loses 1 HP after each victory.

disadvantages.label: Cursed
disadvantages.desc: +1d damage taken if enemy shouts your name.

perks.label: Imposing Presence
perks.desc: Enemy loses 1 on attack for 1 round. Costs 2 MP.

perks.label: Mark of Destiny
perks.desc: If defeated, enemy loses 3 extra HP.

perks.label: Vital Breath
perks.desc: Gains 2 extra HP per round for 3 rounds.

perks.label: Shadow Step
perks.desc: Reveals after 1 round of partial darkness invisibility.

fundamentos.conteudo:
LDI is a virtual combat system where pain is real.
Three billion players compete for position in the SDR ranking.
Each fighter chooses a primary elemental that defines their powers.

tabela: Damage and strength of elemental attacks
atributos.extra:
Scale: 0 = common | 1 = practitioner | 2 = experienced | 3 = veteran | 4 = elite | 5 = absolute top
HP = R × 5 | MP = PdF × 5

combate.conteudo:
INITIATIVE: H + 1d6 — highest acts first

FA (Melee): F + H + 1d6
FA (Elemental): PdF + H + 1d6

FD (Normal): A + H + 1d6
FD (Helpless): A + 1d6

DAMAGE: FA − FD (minimum 0)
CRITICAL: die = 6 → doubles F, PdF or A

tabela: Explosive, aggressive. High damage, constant pressure
Balanced. Versatile, no weaknesses, no peaks

vantagens.conteudo:
Advantages cost character points and represent special techniques and powers.
Disadvantages grant extra points but impose real restrictions.

The final balance must be zero: cost of advantages = gain from disadvantages.

xp.conteudo:
Victory in fair battle: +10 XP
Defeat in fair battle: +1 XP

Every 100 XP: 1 character point to spend on attribute or advantage.

arena.guest_banner: You're playing without an account — your progress won't be saved.
arena.guest_save_prompt_desc: Create a free account to save this sheet and your progress. Your character is ready — don't lose your data!

chama_rapida.name: Quick Flame
chama_rapida.desc: Fires a fast flame dealing +2 elemental damage.

explosao.name: Explosion
explosao.desc: A fire explosion around you. Area damage (doubles FD but hits multiple targets).

labareda.name: Blaze
labareda.desc: An intense blaze. On hit, causes burn (-1 FD on enemy's next turn).

inferno.name: Inferno
inferno.desc: Pure flames consume the enemy. Deals double elemental damage.

escudo_fogo.name: Fire Shield
escudo_fogo.desc: Flames protect you. +2 FD this turn, deals 1 damage if the enemy hits you.

pilar_fogo.name: Pillar of Fire
pilar_fogo.desc: A pillar of fire erupts from the ground. Medium damage but ignores 3 FD.

projetil_agua.name: Water Projectile
projetil_agua.desc: Fires pressurized water. Deals +2 elemental damage.

onda.name: Wave
onda.desc: A wave pushes the enemy. Damage + reduces enemy FA by 1 next turn.

nevoeiro.name: Fog
nevoeiro.desc: Creates dense fog. Enemy has -2 FA on next attack.

cura.name: Light Heal
cura.desc: Revitalizing water. Recovers 2 HP (cannot exceed max).

torrente.name: Torrent
torrente.desc: A massive water jet. Deals double elemental damage.

gelo.name: Ice
gelo.desc: Frozen water. Damage + enemy loses 1 Skill next turn.

projetil_pedra.name: Stone Projectile
projetil_pedra.desc: Throws a stone. Deals +2 elemental damage.

muralha.name: Wall
muralha.desc: Raises a stone wall. +3 FD this turn.

terremoto.name: Earthquake
terremoto.desc: The ground shakes. Deals double elemental damage and stuns enemy (-1 FA and FD next turn).

armadura.name: Earth Armor
armadura.desc: Coats your body in stone. +2 FD for 2 turns.

areia_movel.name: Quicksand
areia_movel.desc: The ground becomes unstable. Enemy loses next turn (cannot attack).

lanca_pedra.name: Stone Lance
lanca_pedra.desc: A stone lance pierces the enemy. Ignores 4 FD.

rajada.name: Gust
rajada.desc: A gust of wind. Deals +2 elemental damage.

ciclone.name: Cyclone
ciclone.desc: A cyclone surrounds the enemy. Deals double elemental damage.

escudo_vento.name: Wind Shield
escudo_vento.desc: Wind deflects attacks. +2 FD this turn.

passos_leves.name: Light Steps
passos_leves.desc: Wind carries you. +2 Skill for one turn (more initiative).

sopro.name: Big Blow
sopro.desc: A strong gust pushes the enemy away. Enemy loses 1 Skill next turn.

tempestade.name: Storm
tempestade.desc: Small air explosions. Deals damage + -1 FD on enemy for 2 turns.

sombra_atacante.name: Shadow Strike
sombra_atacante.desc: Shadows attack the enemy. Deals +2 elemental damage.

dreno.name: Drain
dreno.desc: Drains enemy energy. Deals damage and recovers 1 HP.

nevoa_escura.name: Dark Fog
nevoa_escura.desc: Darkness envelops the arena. Enemy has -2 FA on next attack.

toque_sombrio.name: Shadow Touch
toque_sombrio.desc: A consuming touch. Deals double elemental damage.

medo.name: Fear
medo.desc: Projects fear into the enemy's mind. Enemy skips next attack (but still defends).

raio_luz.name: Light Ray
raio_luz.desc: A blinding light ray. Deals +2 elemental damage.

explosao_luz.name: Light Explosion
explosao_luz.desc: Blinding explosion. Deals double elemental damage and enemy has -1 FA next turn.

purificacao.name: Purification
purificacao.desc: Removes a negative status or heals 1 additional HP.

fulgor.name: Radiance
fulgor.desc: Intense light. Deals damage + enemy has -1 FD next turn.

impacto.name: Impact
impacto.desc: A neutral energy strike. Deals +2 damage.

pulso.name: Pulse
pulso.desc: Energy pulse. Deals damage and pushes enemy back (-1 FA next turn).

carga_total.name: Full Charge
carga_total.desc: All your energy in one blow. Deals double damage.

sobrecarga.name: Overload
sobrecarga.desc: Overloads your circuits. Next attack deals +3 damage.

tamagoshi.troca_erro_free_cooldown: free account can only trade every 3 months. {dias} days remaining.
tamagoshi.troca_erro_elite_mes: elite account has already used this month's trade.
tamagoshi.troca_erro_primordial_cooldown: primordial must wait 15 days between trades. {dias} days remaining.
tamagoshi.troca_erro_primordial_mes: primordial has already used the 2 trades this month.
tamagoshi.troca_erro_ambos_vivos: both must be alive to trade
tamagoshi.partida_salao_fama: {nome} has entered the Marelia Hall of Fame.
tamagoshi.saude_instrucao_curativo: Put a bandage on the creature
tamagoshi.saude_instrucao_xarope: Give the syrup to the creature
tamagoshi.partida_texto_carente: you were the best thing that ever happened to me. thank you. i'll remember you forever.
tamagoshi.partida_texto_agressivo: ...take care. not because i care. take care.
tamagoshi.partida_texto_independente: time to go. it was enough.
tamagoshi.partida_texto_fofo: i knew you wouldn't abandon me. i knew it.
tamagoshi.partida_texto_filosofo: twelve months is a blink in the universe. but it was a beautiful blink.
tamagoshi.partida_texto_comico: dude. what a journey. can i go now? i'm hungry out there too.
tamagoshi.personalidade_agressivo_desc: empty threats, performative anger, deep down just wants attention
tamagoshi.personalidade_fofo_desc: total enthusiasm, turns everything into a party
tamagoshi.personalidade_filosofo_desc: thoughtful, turns need into existential observation
tamagoshi.personalidade_comico_desc: oblivious to drama, genuine confusion, out-of-context comments
tamagoshi.evolucao_ovo_desc: a mysterious egg pulsating with energy
tamagoshi.evolucao_anciao_desc: wise, calm, scars from many stories
tamagoshi.passeio_terminal_rodoviario_desc: buses coming and going, hurried people, fleeting stories
tamagoshi.passeio_beco_risca_faca_desc: yellow light, distant music, familiar danger
tamagoshi.passeio_orla_noturna_desc: salty wind, crashing waves, infinite sky
tamagoshi.passeio_feira_livre_desc: colorful stalls, food smells, people talking loud
tamagoshi.passeio_rua_branca_desc: silence, mist, a place forgotten by time
tamagoshi.notif_carente_boasvindas: "ah… you came. i was counting the seconds."
tamagoshi.notif_carente_fome: "i'm hungry but it's fine, stay there, i can handle it... probably"
tamagoshi.notif_carente_sede: "three hours without water. three. hours. i'm totally fine not"
tamagoshi.notif_carente_passeio: "you didn't take me out today. i stayed here alone. staring at the wall."
tamagoshi.notif_carente_critico: "i'm bad. really bad. but go ahead, i'll be here"
tamagoshi.notif_carente_morte: "so this was it... knew it would end like this... at least i was with you at the end"
tamagoshi.notif_agressivo_boasvindas: "oh, you're here. took long enough. but fine."
tamagoshi.notif_agressivo_passeio: "if you don't take me out of here i'll destroy everything inside"
tamagoshi.notif_agressivo_critico: "i'm at my limit. i'm not asking. i'm warning."
tamagoshi.notif_agressivo_morte: "...fine. i get it. it was good while it lasted. you idiot."
tamagoshi.notif_fofo_boasvindas: "HI! SO GLAD YOU CAME! I'M SO HAPPY!"
tamagoshi.notif_fofo_fome: "hi! i'm a little hungry! but it's okay! you'll come soon right? right? right?"
tamagoshi.notif_fofo_sede: "water please please please thank you love you"
tamagoshi.notif_fofo_passeio: "WALK? ARE WE WALKING TODAY? just asking, no pressure, but ARE WE?"
tamagoshi.notif_fofo_critico: "hi... i'm a little unwell... but i'll be fine when you get here okay?"
tamagoshi.notif_fofo_morte: "it was so good... thank you for everything... i'll miss you... so much..."
tamagoshi.notif_independente_passeio: "it would be useful to go out today."
tamagoshi.notif_filosofo_boasvindas: "your presence raises interesting questions. how are you?"
tamagoshi.notif_filosofo_fome: "the emptiness in the stomach is kin to the void in the universe. both have solutions."
tamagoshi.notif_filosofo_sede: "water belongs to no one. but i could use some right now."
tamagoshi.notif_filosofo_passeio: "it's been a while since i've seen the skies of Marelia. or any sky."
tamagoshi.notif_filosofo_critico: "i'm approaching an interesting frontier. i'd rather not cross it today."
tamagoshi.notif_filosofo_morte: "the frontier has been crossed. don't worry. it's just another journey."
tamagoshi.notif_comico_boasvindas: "ah! it's you! what a coincidence! i was just thinking about… something else."
tamagoshi.notif_comico_sede: "water. juice. anything. even that boring flat water is fine"
tamagoshi.notif_comico_passeio: "we need to go out. i saw a pigeon here that i want to get to know better"
tamagoshi.notif_comico_critico: "man. this is getting serious. i think. i don't know. i'm dizzy"
tamagoshi.notif_comico_morte: "can't believe i'm gonna die over a cookie. what a story to tell on the other side"

tamagoshi.brincadeira_ganhou_desc: the creature loved playing with you!
tamagoshi.brincadeira_perdeu_desc: try again or practice in Minigames!

termo.intro: Before continuing, please read carefully. A Tamagoshi is a digital living being. It depends on you to survive.
termo.regra_passear: You must take it for walks
termo.regra_saude: You must take care of its health
termo.aviso_morte: If you neglect your Tamagoshi and it dies, you will not be able to create another for 6 months.
termo.aviso_cooldown: You will need to wait 6 months before adopting a new one.
termo.aviso_vida: Your Tamagoshi will live up to 1 year. After that, it will move on.
termo.aviso_fama: When your Tamagoshi departs, it will enter the Hall of Fame and be remembered forever.
termo.guest_desc: Your creature and progress are saved only during this session — reloading the page or closing the browser loses everything, and you'll start over next visit. To keep your creature alive between sessions, create a free account.
termo.btn_li: I HAVE READ AND UNDERSTAND THE TERMS
termo.confirmacao_texto: A Tamagoshi needs daily attention. Are you ready for this responsibility?

pesadelo.subtitulo: 20 cases. a conspiracy. a friend in danger.

jackcandy.subtitulo: dreams have no rules. but they have beer.
jackcandy.perda_progresso: all progress in this slot will be lost.
jackcandy.intro_sonhos: dreams have no logic. this one has beer.
jackcandy.sem_itens_slot: no items for this slot in your bag.
jackcandy.interior_todos_comprados: you've bought all available items here.
jackcandy.dossier_sem_pistas: no clues yet. visit the case locations.
jackcandy.dossier_dica: 👓 "you have enough evidence for an accusation. but more clues increase your chances." — Prof. Machine
jackcandy.descanso_desmaiou: you passed out. restart with half strength.
jackcandy.dungeonselect_vazio: no dungeons available. explore the village first.
jackcandy.dungeonselect_sub: enter where the night is darkest
jackcandy.dungeonselect_auto_aviso: ⚠️ auto mode takes longer to level up
jackcandy.interrogatorio_fim: kim looked at you with that usual face. the face of someone who knows more than they tell. and smiled. you hate when he does that.
jackcandy.investigacao_puzzle_decoder: the document is encrypted. use the decoder to reveal the message.
jackcandy.investigacao_puzzle_stealth: the area is guarded. pass without being seen. red zones = camera sees you.
jackcandy.investigacao_puzzle_sliding: the document was torn. reconstruct the pieces.
jackcandy.investigacao_puzzle_falhou_dica: you can try again or break down the door. breaking down is not elegant. but it works.
jackcandy.investigacao_ja_visitado: this location has already been investigated.
jackcandy.guest_desc: Your progress (beers, level, items, solved cases) is kept only during this session — reloading the page loses everything and you start over. To keep your progress between visits, create a free account.

lobby.desc: A digital gamebook narrative RPG set in the Illusion Fight universe. Your choices define your destiny in the arena.
lobby.guest_desc: Your progress is kept only during this session — if you reload the page or close the browser, your character sheet and adventure progress are lost. To really save and continue another day, create a free account.
lobby.modal_sub: Choose how to create your character in LDI:
lobby.modal_neoguide_desc: Guided flow: answer questions and the system builds your sheet step by step. Ideal for beginners.
lobby.modal_zero_desc: Full form: choose advantages, disadvantages, skills and specializations. For veterans.

create_steps.step1_question: How do you prefer to move in the LDI?
create_steps.step1_a: Explosion and speed — break in, break everything
create_steps.step1_c: Resistance and presence — nobody moves you
create_steps.step2_a: Accept the element the system chose (Fire)
create_steps.step2_b: Refuse — the system got it wrong (Water)
create_steps.step3_question: Which combat kit do you want to start with?
create_steps.step3_b: Twin Blades — speed and double strike
create_steps.step4_question: What do you want to achieve in the LDI?
create_steps.step4_a: Power — reach the top of the ranking

char_data.attr_F: Power (F): Melee combat damage. Essential in Unarmed and Armed modes. The higher, the more HP you take per attack.
char_data.attr_H: Agility (H): Speed and initiative. Essential for acting first and dodging. Favors Armed mode and increases your FD.
char_data.attr_R: Resistance (R): Your max HP (HP = R × 5). Vital in any mode. Without resistance, you won't last till the end.
char_data.attr_A: Protection (A): Damage reduction and defense. Favors Unarmed mode. Increases your FD and damage resistance.
char_data.attr_PdF: Elemental Power (PdF): Elemental damage and max MP (MP = PdF × 4). Essential in Power mode. Unlocks elemental attacks.
char_data.adv_reflexos_rapidos_desc: Your reaction is faster than the LDI average. You gain +1 on initiative rolls and can act first even against faster opponents.
char_data.adv_corpo_adaptado_desc: Your body has already adapted to the LDI's rigors. Reduce all physical damage received by 1 point.
char_data.adv_sangue_frio_desc: Extreme situations don't shake you. You ignore penalties from critical HP state and don't suffer fear in combat.
char_data.adv_sintonia_elemental_desc: Your connection to the element is natural. Your Power attacks cost 1 less MP.
char_data.adv_mestre_arma_desc: With your preferred weapon, you're lethal. +1 damage with your current weapon.
char_data.adv_leitura_combate_desc: You anticipate the enemy's movements. +1 FD against the first attack of each turn.
char_data.adv_regeneracao_rapida_desc: Your body recovers faster inside the LDI. Recover 1 HP per combat turn.
char_data.adv_foco_mental_desc: Your concentration is a weapon. +1 FA in Power mode.
char_data.dis_corpo_fragil_desc: Your body doesn't adapt well to the LDI. Your max HP is reduced by 2.
char_data.dis_medo_arena_desc: The arena intimidates you. You suffer -1 FA on the first turn of each combat.
char_data.dis_impulsivo_desc: You act before thinking. Any flee in combat has a chance to fail (roll 1-3 on d6 fails).
char_data.dis_sobrecarga_sensorial_desc: The LDI overwhelms your senses. You lose 1 MP at the start of each combat.
char_data.dis_desconfiado_desc: You trust few. Some dialogue choices may not be available.
char_data.dis_dreno_energetico_desc: The system drains your energy. You recover 1 less MP per day.
char_data.dis_ataduras_frageis_desc: Your healing equipment is inefficient. Healing received is reduced by 1.
char_data.dis_marca_visivel_desc: You have a unique digital mark that enemies recognize. Some enemies will be more aggressive.
char_data.perk_pericia_katana_desc: You know how to use katanas with mastery. Requires Katana equipped. +1 FA in Armed mode with katana.
char_data.perk_pericia_laminas_desc: You master the use of twin blades. Requires Twin Blades. +1 on total damage.
char_data.perk_pericia_corrente_desc: You handle the chain with skill. Requires Chain Blade. +1 FD when using chain.
char_data.perk_esquiva_agil_desc: You have trained reflexes. +1 FD if your H is higher than the enemy's.
char_data.perk_golpe_pesado_desc: Your blows carry brute force. +2 damage on critical (FA - FD ≥ 5).
char_data.perk_postura_defensiva_desc: You know how to protect yourself. +2 FD, but -1 FA this turn.
char_data.perk_ataque_preciso_desc: You aim calmly. If you choose not to attack on a turn, +2 FA next turn.
char_data.perk_canalizacao_desc: You channel elemental power efficiently. Your Power mode attacks ignore 2 points of FD.
char_data.spec_combate_desc: Specialized in direct combat. Gain +1 FA and +1 FD in combat, but -1 on stealth tests.
char_data.spec_tecnico_desc: You understand the LDI systems. Reduce special action costs by 1 MP.
char_data.spec_furtivo_desc: You move on the edges of the system. Stealth actions have advantage and you can flee combat without penalty.
char_data.spec_suporte_desc: You support allies (if any). +1 HP healing on rests and can share MP with allies.
char_data.spec_elemental_desc: Your elemental connection is maximum. In Power mode, you can spend 2 extra MP to double elemental damage.

sections.title: What is the LDI?
sections.content: LDI stands for "Lutas de Ilusão" (Illusion Fight), a digital combat system where fighters connect their minds to battle in virtual arenas. You are a new competitor in Arc 1: Discovery.

sections.title: Attributes
sections.content:
F (Power): Melee damage. Favors Unarmed and Armed.
H (Agility): Initiative and dodge. Favors Armed.
R (Resistance): Max HP (R × 5). Vital for any style.
A (Protection): Defense and damage reduction. Favors Unarmed.
PdF (Elemental Power): Elemental damage and MP (PdF × 4). Essential for Power mode.

sections.title: Combat — Modes
sections.content:
✊ Unarmed: Uses F and A. Moderate damage, high defense.
⚔️ Armed: Uses F and H. High damage, high initiative.
⚡ Power: Uses PdF and MP. Elemental damage, consumes MP.

sections.title: Combat — System
sections.content: Each turn: you attack (FA) and the enemy defends (FD). If FA > FD, you deal damage equal to the difference. Then the enemy attacks. Whoever reduces the opponent's HP to zero first wins.

sections.title: HP and MP
sections.content:
HP (Hit Points): R × 5. If it reaches zero, you lose the combat.
MP (Magic Points): PdF × 4. Used for Power mode attacks and special actions. Recovers when resting or with items.

sections.title: Powers
sections.content: You can use up to 4 powers per combat. Each power is a special attack that costs 1 MP. The power type depends on your elemental (Fire, Water, etc.). Powers deal additional damage or special effects.

sections.title: Arcs and Progression
sections.content: The story is divided into Arcs. Each arc has days. Each day you explore, make choices, and face combat. Your decisions affect the plot, your sheet, and the available endings.

sections.title: Advantages and Disadvantages
sections.content: Advantages cost creation points. Disadvantages grant extra points to spend on attributes and skills. The total creation points are limited.

sections.title: Survival Tips
sections.content:
1. Don't neglect R — low HP = quick death.
2. Choose a main combat mode and focus on the right attributes.
3. Save credits for healing items.
4. Explore everything — clues reveal secrets and alternate endings.
5. If you're losing, the option to flee exists for a reason.

fogo.name: Quick Flame
fogo.desc: Fires a swift flame dealing +2 elemental damage.

fogo.name: Explosion
fogo.desc: A fire explosion around you. Deals area damage (doubles FD but hits multiple targets).

fogo.name: Blaze
fogo.desc: An intense blaze. If it hits, causes burn (-1 FD on enemy's next turn).

fogo.name: Inferno
fogo.desc: Pure flames consume the enemy. Deals double elemental damage.

fogo.name: Fire Shield
fogo.desc: Flames protect you. +2 FD this turn, deals 1 damage if the enemy hits.

fogo.name: Fire Pillar
fogo.desc: A pillar of fire erupts from the ground. Medium damage but ignores 3 FD.

agua.name: Water Projectile
agua.desc: Fires pressurized water. Deals +2 elemental damage.

agua.name: Wave
agua.desc: A wave pushes the enemy. Damage + reduces enemy FA by 1 on next turn.

agua.name: Fog
agua.desc: Creates a dense fog. Enemy has -2 FA on next attack.

agua.name: Light Heal
agua.desc: Revitalizing water. Recovers 2 HP (cannot exceed max).

agua.name: Torrent
agua.desc: A massive water jet. Deals double elemental damage.

agua.name: Ice
agua.desc: Frozen water. Damage + enemy loses 1 H on next turn.

terra.name: Stone Projectile
terra.desc: Throws a stone. Deals +2 elemental damage.

terra.name: Wall
terra.desc: Raises a stone wall. +3 FD this turn.

terra.name: Earthquake
terra.desc: The ground trembles. Deals double elemental damage and stuns the enemy (-1 FA and FD next turn).

terra.name: Earth Armor
terra.desc: Coats your body in stone. +2 FD for 2 turns.

terra.name: Quicksand
terra.desc: The ground becomes unstable. Enemy loses next turn (doesn't attack).

terra.name: Stone Lance
terra.desc: A stone lance pierces the enemy. Ignores 4 FD.

ar.name: Gust
ar.desc: A gust of wind. Deals +2 elemental damage.

ar.name: Cyclone
ar.desc: A cyclone envelops the enemy. Deals double elemental damage.

ar.name: Wind Shield
ar.desc: Wind deflects attacks. +2 FD this turn.

ar.name: Light Steps
ar.desc: Wind carries you. +2 H for one turn (more initiative).

ar.name: Big Blow
ar.desc: A strong gust pushes the enemy away. Enemy loses 1 H on next turn.

ar.name: Storm
ar.desc: Small air explosions. Deals damage + -1 FD on enemy for 2 turns.

trevas.name: Attacking Shadow
trevas.desc: Shadows attack the enemy. Deals +2 elemental damage.

trevas.name: Drain
trevas.desc: Drains energy from the enemy. Deals damage and recovers 1 HP.

trevas.name: Dark Fog
trevas.desc: Darkness envelops the arena. Enemy has -2 FA on next attack.

trevas.name: Dark Touch
trevas.desc: A consuming touch. Deals double elemental damage.

trevas.name: Fear
trevas.desc: Projects fear into the enemy's mind. Enemy loses next attack (but still defends).

luz.name: Light Ray
luz.desc: A blinding light ray. Deals +2 elemental damage.

luz.name: Light Explosion
luz.desc: Explosion blinds the enemy. Deals double elemental damage and enemy has -1 FA next turn.

luz.name: Purification
luz.desc: Removes a negative status or heals 1 additional HP.

luz.name: Blaze
luz.desc: Intense light. Deals damage + enemy has -1 FD next turn.

neutro.name: Impact
neutro.desc: A neutral energy strike. Deals +2 damage.

neutro.name: Pulse
neutro.desc: Energy pulse. Deals damage and pushes the enemy (-1 FA next turn).

neutro.name: Total Charge
neutro.desc: All your energy in one blow. Deals double damage.

neutro.name: Overload
neutro.desc: Overloads your circuits. Next attack deals +3 damage.

intro.texto:
Marelia, 1954. It hasn't stopped raining for three days.

You're not a detective.

But the dream doesn't care.

menu.confirmar:
are you sure?
this deletes everything.

final.msg_jack:
it was a pleasure working with you.
marelia will keep needing someone like you.

local.puzzle_instrucao: Solve the puzzle to investigate this location.

acusar.bloqueada: case failed. restart to try again.

caderno.desc: Thread clues collected form a pattern. Someone is connecting all the cases.
caderno.vazio: No Thread clues collected yet. Solve cases to find connections.
caderno.conspiracao_5: A name keeps coming up. Kim. The bar owner. Always present, never suspected.
caderno.conspiracao_10: The pieces are falling into place. Someone is orchestrating crime in Marelia. Someone who knows everyone involved.
caderno.conspiracao_15: The pattern is clear. Kim is at the center of everything. Every case, every death, every clue leads to the corner bar.

dormindo.texto:
You were defeated. The dream goes dark. Jack lies in the alley, rain washing blood off the asphalt.

In a few minutes, someone will find him. Or maybe no one will. This is Marelia.

fimscreen.completo: You collected enough clues. Kim was confronted with all the evidence. The dream ends with clarity — but the memories remain.
fimscreen.fragmentado: You didn't get all the clues. Kim admits to some crimes, but partially escapes. The dream ends with doubt — maybe there's more to uncover.

feed.stories_vazio:
No clues collected yet.

Investigate the case locations to reveal evidence.
feed.caderno_vazio:
"I still don't know who it is.
but every clue connects one point to another."

custos.title: How this project exists
custos.intro: Illusion Fight is an independent project. One person, 23 years of development, launching in 2026. No investor. No team. Just a developer who works a full-time job from 9 to 6, then spends nights and weekends building this. Holidays, late nights, every free hour — man, that's just how it goes.

s1.title: What it costs to keep this running
s1.sub2: What it'll cost as it grows
s1.body: Right now costs are low because the user base is still small. When it scales — and it will — it'll need dedicated servers, more database capacity, more processing power. Every online feature has a real cost. Real-time multiplayer, progress saving, global ranking — all of it runs on infrastructure that charges per use.

s2.title: Why free accounts have limits
s2.body: It's not punishment. It's math. If a thousand people play for free and nobody contributes, the project shuts down or the games go offline. The limits exist so the project can survive while still giving real access to people who can't pay. As the user base grows, if the number of supporters doesn't keep up, free account limits will need to be adjusted. That'll be communicated here in advance, no surprises.

s3.title: What your subscription funds
s3.item1: Infrastructure for everyone — including people who don't pay

s4.title: One thing worth saying
s4.body: No money goes to ads. No data is sold. No banners. The product is the product.
s4.thanks: If you use it, enjoy it, and can contribute — thank you. That keeps the lights on.
s4.free: If you can't contribute right now — that's fine. Enjoy what's available.

custos.footer: This page is updated when costs change.
